February: लोकाः समस्ताः सुखिनो भवन्तु| (May all beings everywhere be happy and free.)
March: सा विद्या या विमुक्तये| (That is knowledge which liberates.)
April: कर्मण्येवाधिकारस्ते मा फलेषु कदाचन । (You have a right to perform your prescribed duties, but you are not entitled to the fruits of your actions.)
May: अप्राप्यं नाम नेहास्ति धीरस्य व्यवसायिनः। (There is no such thing as unattainable for the determined.)
June: अनारम्भस्तु कार्याणां प्रथमं बुद्धिलक्षणम्। आरब्धस्यान्तगमनं द्वितीयं बुद्धिलक्षणम्॥ (Non-initiation of actions is the first characteristic of wisdom. Completion of actions is the second characteristic of wisdom.)
August: लोकाः समस्ताः सुखिनो भवन्तु| (May all beings everywhere be happy and free.)
September: ॐ सर्वे भवन्तु सुखिनः| (May all beings be happy.)
October: कर्मण्येवाधिकारस्ते मा फलेषु कदाचन । (You have a right to perform your prescribed duties, but you are not entitled to the fruits of your actions.)
November: अप्राप्यं नाम नेहास्ति धीरस्य व्यवसायिनः। (There is no such thing as unattainable for the determined.)
December: अनारम्भस्तु कार्याणां प्रथमं बुद्धिलक्षणम्। आरब्धस्यान्तगमनं द्वितीयं बुद्धिलक्षणम्॥ (Non-initiation of actions is the first characteristic of wisdom. Completion of actions is the second characteristic of wisdom.)
